sources.label: Checked-in upstream snapshot provenance manifest
supports: upstream origin and revision evidence boundaries
dependency mapping and deliberate refresh workflow
sources.notes: Machine-readable provenance manifest for important checked-in references and derived reviews. It does not replace vendored files, perform network checks, or resolve lineage that local evidence does not support. Validate with scripts/validate-upstream-snapshots.py.

README, top-level tree, selected metadata files, and directory inventories were inspected without importing source code or generated data; see docs/libmooncat.md.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue Contract GitLab repository

sources.label: MoonCatRescue website archive GitLab repository
supports: browser-side searchSeed and rescueCat call boundary
sources.notes: Verified by GitLab project metadata on 2026-07-03: public project mooncatrescue/mooncatrescue-web, default branch master, last activity 2022-09-22. GitLab description says it is original content of mooncatrescue.com archive; metadata reports it is forked from ponderware/mooncatrescue-archive. Focused local clone review on 2026-07-07 inspected only public/scan.html, public/js/mine.js, and public/js/mine-worker.js for rescue-mining behavior at commit 941cabe56315efeb5cb0d97966419b59acc14115; unrelated frontend code and bundled/minified files were not imported.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue upstream reference README
sources.notes: Local README for the upstream reference snapshot. It documents that these files are reference inputs, not curated KB data.

sources.label: Generated MoonCat visual-trait sample
supports: LibMoonCat identifier and trait mismatch reporting
sources.notes: Generated deterministically by scripts/generate-visual-traits.py from the three registered checked-in MoonCatRescue reference inputs. Validate with scripts/validate-visual-traits.py. This is not a complete 25,440-row dataset and does not establish live-source freshness.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue libmooncat-limited.js reference
supports: array-backed rescue order to catId lookup
array-backed catId to rescue order lookup
sources.notes: Local upstream reference copy. Checked exports include getMoonCatIdByRescueIndex, getCatId, getRescueOrder, parseCatId, and typed getTraits helpers. The embedded mapping supports lookup behavior; do not copy the full mapping into curated KB data without a focused generated-data pass.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue mooncat_traits.json reference
sources.notes: Local upstream reference copy. Validated as JSON and structurally checked as 25,440 rows ordered by rescueOrder with unique catId values; this dataset is not imported into curated KB data.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue mooncatparser.js reference
sources.notes: Local upstream reference copy. Reviewed only for bytes5 catId parser input context in this pass; do not derive trait mappings from it without a separate review.

sources.label: Etherscan original MoonCatRescue contract page

sources.label: Etherscan Acclimated MoonCats contract page
sources.notes: Verified Etherscan page for the Acclimated MoonCats token contract at 0xc3f733ca98E0daD0386979Eb96fb1722A1A05E69. Use for contract/source provenance; do not generalize token ID behavior to older wrappers or unrelated contracts.

sources.label: Etherscan Wrapped MoonCatsRescue contract page
supports: bytes5 catId to wrapper tokenID mapping behavior
wrapper tokenID to bytes5 catId mapping behavior
sources.notes: Verified Etherscan page for MoonCatsWrapped at 0x7C40c393DC0f283F318791d746d894DdD3693572. Etherscan reports exact-match source verification, contract name MoonCatsWrapped, Solidity compiler v0.7.6, optimization disabled with a 1000-runs setting, and no declared license. The source was reviewed for the compact mapping-backed token identifier summary in data/older-wrapper-internals.json; full artifacts and mapping contents are not imported.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue log: Chained to the Future
sources.notes: Verified MoonCatRescue log page titled Chained to the Future, dated 2022-01-14 / epoch 91999. The page links to on-chain materialization contract pages for MoonCatReference, MoonCatTraits, MoonCatColors, MoonCatSVGs, and MoonCatAccessoryImages.

sources.label: Etherscan MoonCatReference contract page
sources.notes: Verified Etherscan page for MoonCatReference at 0x0B78C64bCE6d6d4447e58b09E53F3621f44A2a48. Etherscan reports source code verified as exact match, Solidity compiler v0.8.1, optimization enabled with 200 runs, and GNU AGPLv3 license.

accessory definition, management, assignment, ownership, eligibility, and administration lifecycle

Reviewed on 2026-07-11 for compact internals only; source, ABI, state, arrays, image payloads, and event history are not imported.

Treat as high-confidence MoonCatRescue publication context, but verify exact function surfaces against contract/source entries before canonical data import.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue Contribute page IPFS pinning list
sources.notes: Checked on 2026-07-04. The official Build with MoonCats page links to this page for IPFS supporting content; the public Contribute page Skills tab lists CIDs for parser, sprite, explainer, voxel, moments, and MoonCat Pop artifacts. This source supports the presence and project description of listed CIDs, not payload validation.

sources.label: MidnightLightning Reddit hue wheel explanation
sources.notes: Reviewed on 2026-07-04 for color-source inventory only. Reddit post and comments are by MidnightLightning and discuss hue wheel colorization, palette categories, shifted bucket boundaries, and genesis black/white categorization. Treat as high-confidence maintainer/community explanation, not source-code proof.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue ADR 0017 MoonCat Color Math
sources.notes: Raw GitLab ADR checked on 2026-07-04. ADR 0017 is marked Accepted and updated 2025-09-17. Use as current-maintainer technical documentation for color-source inventory, while keeping exact canonical data changes in separate focused passes.

sources.label: MidnightLightning Discord color explanation, 2024-01-06
sources.notes: User supplied a Discord blurb attributed to MidnightLightning / MoonCatRescue Team dated 2024-01-06. No canonical URL or raw Discord export was reviewed in this pass. Treat as high-confidence maintainer explanation that needs confirmation from official/source-code records before canonical color model changes.
